problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
mechanism: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry
hypothesis: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Plasma. Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry directly addresses this.
